# Proposal: Sample placeholder for quizgen Phase 1

Author: Example Author
Last updated: 2026-05-13

## Abstract

This is a sample Markdown file used only by the Phase 1 end-to-end
verification of `quizgen`. It exists so the CLI can be exercised before a
real clone of `golang/proposal` is available.

## Proposal

```go
package main

import "fmt"

func main() {
    fmt.Println("hello, quizgen")
}
```
